title: Agentic AI in SDLC
description: Request to explore or implement agentic artificial intelligence within the Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC).
business_case_summary:
Business Case Summary: Agentic AI in SDLC (DEM-2026-0007)

Executive Summary  
This project aims to explore and implement agentic artificial intelligence within the Software Development Life Cycle to enhance automation and decision-making. It will focus on integrating AI agents to improve efficiency and accuracy across development stages.

Business Value and Impact  
Adopting agentic AI can significantly reduce development time and operational costs while increasing software quality through intelligent automation. This innovation positions the company as a leader in advanced software development technologies.

Risk Mitigation  
Medium risks include integration challenges and reliance on AI decision-making. Mitigation involves phased implementation, rigorous testing, and continuous human oversight to ensure reliability and control.
